title: Pattern error / wrong selection caused by actuator or selector issue
online_resolution_steps: Ask whether the wrong pattern appears on the same feed/position or randomly across the fabric.
Stop production and keep a fabric photo showing the defect direction and repeat interval.
Check actuator cable seating and visible damage before restarting.
Run a low-speed test after confirming the program and pattern file are correct.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 先确认错花是否固定出现在同一路/同一位置，还是随机出现在布面。
暂停生产，保留能看清错花方向和循环间距的布面照片。
低速重启前，先检查选针器线缆是否松动、折损或明显接触不良。
确认程序和花型文件正确后，再做低速测试。
safety_warnings: Stop the machine before touching actuator cables or selector area.
Do not bypass covers or force the machine to continue if needle/selector collision is suspected.
safety_warnings_zh: 接触选针器线缆或选针区域前必须停机。
如果怀疑撞针或打选针器，不要强行继续生产。
dispatch_triggers: defect repeats after cable check and program verification
visible actuator/selector/cable damage
machine has collision noise or broken needles
customer cannot safely inspect actuator area
dispatch_triggers_zh: 检查线缆并确认程序后错花仍重复出现
选针器、选针器线缆或选针器板有明显损坏
同时伴随撞针、异响或坏针
客户无法安全检查选针区域
estimated_resolution_time: 15-30 minutes online if cable/program issue; onsite required if actuator or selector hardware is damaged.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 如果只是线缆或程序问题，在线排查约 15-30 分钟；如果选针器硬件损坏，需要现场处理。
confidence_notes: Derived from 2026-04-18 to 2026-05-18 service data: frequent wrong-selection cases with actuator/selector actions.

title: Software disorder, memory/full system issue, or display/control panel fault
online_resolution_steps: Record the screen state, software version, and whether the touch panel still responds.
Power-cycle once only if it is safe and allowed by the customer procedure.
Do not flash software or replace boards without Santoni confirmation.
Prepare the software version, panel photo, and recent program/file operations for escalation.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 先记录屏幕状态、软件版本，以及触摸屏是否仍有反应。
在客户现场流程允许且安全的前提下，只做一次断电重启确认。
未经 Santoni 确认，不要自行刷机或更换主板/显示屏。
准备软件版本、屏幕照片和最近是否有程序/文件操作，方便升级处理。
safety_warnings: Do not repeatedly power-cycle a machine with suspected board or display failure.
Do not perform software flashing without the correct version and backup.
safety_warnings_zh: 疑似主板或显示屏故障时，不要反复断电重启。
没有正确软件版本和备份前，不要自行刷机。
dispatch_triggers: screen remains white or touch panel does not respond after one safe restart
date or system settings cannot be changed
software upgrade fails or correct version is unavailable
PCB/display hardware fault is suspected
dispatch_triggers_zh: 一次安全重启后仍白屏或触摸无反应
日期或系统设置无法修改
软件升级无效或缺少正确版本
怀疑主板/显示屏硬件故障

handoff_payload.recommended_engineer_skill: software, display panel, and PCB troubleshooting

estimated_resolution_time: Remote triage 10-20 minutes; onsite or parts replacement likely if PCB/display is suspected.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 远程判断约 10-20 分钟；如果怀疑主板或显示屏，通常需要现场或备件处理。
confidence_notes: Derived from multiple system disorder, display no-response, date setting, dead machine and PCB replacement cases.

title: Oil leak from oil tank distributor or lubrication component
online_resolution_steps: Stop and clean the visible oil area enough to identify the leak point.
Take photos of the oil tank, distributor/nozzle, and surrounding screws.
Check whether the leak is active after a short safe idle run.
Do not continue production if oil may contaminate fabric or reach electrical parts.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 先停机并清洁可见油污区域，确认漏油点位置。
拍摄油箱、分油器/分油嘴和周边螺丝位置照片。
在安全空转短时间后，观察是否仍持续漏油。
如果油污可能污染布面或接近电气部件，不要继续生产。
safety_warnings: Avoid operating if oil reaches electrical components.
Clean oil spills to prevent slip risk and fabric contamination.
safety_warnings_zh: 如果油污接近电气部件，避免继续运行。
及时清理油污，避免滑倒风险和布面污染。
dispatch_triggers: leak continues after cleaning and short idle check
oil reaches electrical components
visible cracked distributor/nozzle/support
customer cannot identify leak point safely
dispatch_triggers_zh: 清洁并短时间空转后仍持续漏油
油污接近电气部件
分油器/分油嘴/支架有可见裂纹
客户无法安全确认漏油点
estimated_resolution_time: 10-20 minutes online to confirm source; onsite/parts if leak persists.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 在线确认漏油源约 10-20 分钟；持续漏油通常需要现场或备件处理。
confidence_notes: Derived from oil distributor/nozzle and lubricant pump leak cases in the imported service data.

title: Needle crash, broken needles, through-plate/cam/latch opener damage
online_resolution_steps: Stop the machine immediately and do not continue production.
Keep photos of broken needles/cams/through-plate and the alarm screen.
Remove fabric only if the customer engineer can do it safely without forcing moving parts.
Prepare feed/path number, damaged part photos, and whether collision noise occurred.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 立即停机，不要继续强行生产。
保留坏针、三角、护针板等损坏位置照片和报警界面照片。
只有在客户工程师能安全操作时，才可清理布面，不要强拉运动部件。
准备发生位置/路数、损坏件照片，以及是否有撞击异响。
safety_warnings: Do not run the machine with suspected needle/cam collision.
Do not touch moving parts until the machine is fully stopped and isolated.
safety_warnings_zh: 疑似撞针、打针或三角损坏时，不要继续运行机器。
机器完全停稳并隔离前，不要接触运动部件。
dispatch_triggers: any visible broken needle/cam/through-plate/latch opener
repeated collision noise
motor overcurrent or similar alarm appears with mechanical collision
customer cannot safely clear the machine
dispatch_triggers_zh: 可见坏针、三角、护针板或开针钩损坏
重复出现撞击异响
机械撞击伴随马达过流等报警
客户无法安全清理机器

handoff_payload.recommended_engineer_skill: mechanical collision and needle path repair

estimated_resolution_time: Online triage only; onsite inspection is usually required.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 仅适合在线判断风险，通常需要现场检查。
confidence_notes: Derived from imported broken needles, through-plate, latch opener, cam and collision cases.

title: Main motor / ECODD driver / servo drive fault
online_resolution_steps: Record the exact alarm code and whether the motor/driver alarm appears immediately or during knitting.
Check for obvious mechanical obstruction before any restart.
Do not repeatedly restart if overcurrent or driver fault is reported.
Prepare driver status photo and short video of the alarm sequence for Santoni review.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 记录准确报警代码，并确认马达/驱动报警是开机即出现还是编织过程中出现。
任何重启前先确认没有明显机械卡阻。
如果出现马达过流或驱动器故障，不要反复重启。
准备驱动器状态照片和报警出现过程视频，供 Santoni 判断。
safety_warnings: Repeated restart may worsen driver or motor damage.
Mechanical obstruction must be ruled out before electrical troubleshooting.
safety_warnings_zh: 反复重启可能扩大驱动器或马达损坏。
电气排查前必须先排除机械卡阻。
dispatch_triggers: overcurrent alarm repeats
driver fault indicator remains active
mechanical obstruction or collision is suspected
machine cannot run after one safe restart
dispatch_triggers_zh: 马达过流报警重复出现
驱动器故障指示持续存在
怀疑机械卡阻或撞击
一次安全重启后仍无法运行
estimated_resolution_time: Remote triage 10-15 minutes; onsite repair likely if alarm repeats.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 远程判断约 10-15 分钟；报警重复时通常需要现场处理。
confidence_notes: Derived from ECODD driver, main motor and motor-overcurrent cases in the imported data.

title: Yarn sliding sensor / electronic eye / feeder retrofit or learning issue
online_resolution_steps: Confirm whether this is a retrofit/install task or an alarm after production starts.
Check sensor/feeder connection and whether signal changes when yarn passes.
Run the electronic-eye learning/calibration procedure only if customer is trained.
After calibration, idle-run and then test with yarn at low speed.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 先确认这是改装/安装任务，还是生产后出现的电子眼/输纱器报警。
检查电子眼/输纱器连接，并确认纱线经过时信号是否变化。
只有客户工程师受过培训时，才执行电子眼学习/校准步骤。
校准后先空转，再低速带纱测试。
safety_warnings: Do not change sensor learning parameters if the customer is not trained.
Stop the machine before rewiring sensors or feeders.
safety_warnings_zh: 客户未受训时，不要随意修改电子眼学习参数。
重新接线电子眼或输纱器前必须停机。
dispatch_triggers: signal does not change after wiring check
customer is not trained to perform learning
retrofit wiring or mounting is uncertain
alarm repeats after learning/calibration
dispatch_triggers_zh: 检查接线后信号仍无变化
客户未受训，无法安全执行学习步骤
改装接线或安装位置不确定
学习/校准后报警仍重复

handoff_payload.recommended_engineer_skill: sensor learning and feeder retrofit support

estimated_resolution_time: 20-40 minutes online if wiring and learning are straightforward; onsite if retrofit is unclear.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 如果接线和学习流程清楚，在线约 20-40 分钟；改装状态不清楚时建议现场。
confidence_notes: Derived from imported electronic eye / feeder installation and sensor learning cases.

title: Socks heel, terry, picking or fabric formation issue
online_resolution_steps: Ask for defect photos from both inside and outside of the sock and note the machine position.
Confirm whether the defect appears every cycle or intermittently.
Check program changes, yarn path, needle selection, and relevant picker/sinker position.
Test at low speed after one controlled adjustment.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 请客户提供袜子内外侧缺陷照片，并标注机台/位置。
确认缺陷是每个循环都出现，还是间歇出现。
检查最近程序修改、纱路、选针动作，以及相关掀针头/生克片位置。
每次只做一项受控调整，然后低速测试。
safety_warnings: Do not adjust picker/sinker/needle area while the machine is running.
Avoid multiple simultaneous adjustments, otherwise root cause becomes unclear.
safety_warnings_zh: 机器运行时不要调整掀针头、生克片或针区。
不要同时改多项参数，否则很难判断根因。
dispatch_triggers: defect repeats after one controlled adjustment
visible damage to picker/sinker/needle area
customer cannot safely inspect fabric formation area
program issue requires Santoni technician tuning
dispatch_triggers_zh: 一次受控调整后缺陷仍重复出现
掀针头、生克片或针区有可见损坏
客户无法安全检查成圈区域
程序问题需要 Santoni 工程师调试

handoff_payload.recommended_engineer_skill: socks fabric formation and program tuning

estimated_resolution_time: 30-60 minutes online if adjustment is simple; onsite if mechanical damage or repeated defect remains.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 如果是简单调整，在线约 30-60 分钟；若存在机械损坏或持续重复缺陷，需要现场处理。
confidence_notes: Derived from socks and Soosan socks cases involving heel holes, terry/picking and fabric formation issues.

title: Parts claim / broken delivered part / warranty replacement handling
online_resolution_steps: Collect clear photos of the damaged part, label, and machine serial number.
Confirm whether the machine is stopped or this is a spare-part claim only.
Do not install visibly damaged parts.
Prepare part name, quantity, and claim reason for Santoni service follow-up.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 收集损坏配件、标签和机器序列号的清晰照片。
确认机器是否停机，还是单纯备件索赔。
不要安装肉眼可见损坏的配件。
准备配件名称、数量和索赔原因，交给 Santoni 服务跟进。
safety_warnings: Do not install or test a visibly damaged safety or electrical part.
Keep original packaging and labels for traceability.
safety_warnings_zh: 明显损坏的安全件或电气件不要安装测试。
保留原包装和标签，方便追溯。
probable_causes: part damaged before or during delivery
dispatch_triggers: machine is stopped and part replacement is urgent
customer needs onsite confirmation before claim
part identity or machine compatibility is unclear
dispatch_triggers_zh: 机器停机且备件更换紧急
客户需要现场确认后才能索赔
配件身份或机型兼容性不明确

handoff_payload.recommended_engineer_skill: warranty and spare parts claim support

estimated_resolution_time: Online information collection 5-10 minutes; fulfillment depends on parts process.
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 在线收集信息约 5-10 分钟；后续时效取决于备件流程。
confidence_notes: Derived from multiple imported warranty and spare-parts claim records.
